system.description: Serenity eases the character’s sense of fear. Under its effects, he cannot lose Nerve. This also slows his reaction time. Any physical action has a -2d penalty on the check. They are highly addictive and tend to be psychoactive. After taking a dose, the character must make a TN 6 Resolve save or become Addicted. Once Addicted, he will require at least 1 dose every week else begin Withdrawing.
